headline: FMX Boosts Share Repurchase Plan, Progresses Well on Forward Strategy
summary: Fomento ramps up buybacks with a $300M ASR after completing a $260M repurchase, advancing its shareholder return strategy.

headline: Coca-Cola vs. Keurig: Which Beverage Stock Looks Poised for Growth?
summary: KO leans on global scale and pricing power, while KDP taps innovation, category expansion and valuation appeal in a shifting beverage market.

raw.headline: Coca-Cola vs. Keurig: Which Beverage Stock Looks Poised for Growth?

headline: Crooked Pop™ Launches a New Era of Clean Alcohol with USDA-Certified Organic, Zero-Sugar Hard Soda
summary: Nine years after disrupting the beverage industry with Bai™, founder Ben Weiss is back to challenge another category: Alcohol.

headline: Puig stock soars 13% after Estée Lauder confirms takeover talks with Charlotte Tilbury maker
summary: Shares of Puig Brands closed 13.4% higher Tuesday after beauty peer Estée Lauder confirmed it is in talks about merging the two companies.
